Assistant Professor

Faisal Shameem

Mechanical Engineering expert at Galgotias University. Specializing in CFD, AI Integration in Teaching, and Thermo-Fluid simulations with over 12 years of academic excellence.

12+ Years Experience

Core Expertise

Scientific Computing

Simulation & CFD

Mastery in ANSYS Fluent, ICEMCFD, and SolidWorks for complex engineering and biological fluid simulations.

Academia

Fluid Mechanics

Dedicated educator teaching Thermodynamics, Heat Transfer, and Aerodynamic design to the next generation of engineers.

Innovation

AI Integration in Teaching Learning

Revolutionizing mechanical engineering education by integrating advanced AI tools into the curriculum to foster personalized learning and research excellence.
